Architected and delivered **AI-driven planning automation**, building an internal AI agent that reduced planning cycle time by 39% and increased drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding enterprise customer coverage.

Partnered with partner engineering teams at Databricks and NetApp to validate platform **integration resilience**, translating technical recovery outcomes into executive-ready business value narratives for senior stakeholder reviews.

Conducted competitive and technical landscape research across cloud resilience domains, **educating internal stakeholders** on emerging risks and shaping the roadmap to address the most critical enterprise security and availability gaps.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and ensure on-schedule delivery against enterprise deployment milestones.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and search profiles to strengthen top-of-funnel enterprise lead generation.
